subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all letters and words, befitteth Him Who is the Revealer of verses and the Manifestor of clear proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از حروف و کلمات منزل آیات و مظهر بینات را لایق و سزاست که بکوثر
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for governments and rulers, @praise and encouragement
